testcase.name: setup

error.message: Cannot serialize object because no JSON serializer found in classpath. Please put Jackson (Databind), Gson, Johnzon, or Yasson in the classpath.

testcase.error: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Cannot serialize object because no JSON serializer found in classpath. Please put Jackson (Databind), Gson, Johnzon, or Yasson in the classpath. at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectConstructorHandleAccessor.newInstance(DirectConstructorHandleAccessor.java:62) at
